case_title: KOHLENBERG & ASSOCIATES VOCATIONAL COUNSELING VS. DEBORAH GILMORE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,287.78 FILED BY KOHLENBERG & ASSOCIATES VOCATIONAL COUNSELING SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT GILMORE, DEBORAH HARRIS, MICHELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF DEPT., "UNSUCCESSFUL/DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND/PRIVATE BLDG NOT ALLOW TO ANY PERSONAL SERVICE". FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOHLENBERG & ASSOCIATES VOCATIONAL COUNSELING SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, MICHELLE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $45.00) SERVED MAR-27-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GILMORE, DEBORAH
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (RECEIVED VIA MAIL), FILED BY PLAINTIFF.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY 16,2011 - NO APPEARANCES, THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL; CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA; NOT REPORTED.
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.
